articles.title: Dogecoin Competitor Shiba Inu Erupts, Hitting $10,000,000,000 Market Cap As Bitcoin and Ethereum Tap Resistance
articles.description: Capital in the crypto markets is shifting to meme coins as a new week kicks off. The Ethereum-based dog-themed crypto asset Shiba Inu (SHIB) soared 40% in the last 24-hours, briefly shattering a $10,000,000,000 market cap. The Dogecoin (DOGE) rival’s rise from $0.00001259 to as high as $0.00001762 comes just after Bitcoin and Ethereum tapped […]

articles.title: Shiba Inu eyes 50% rally as SHIB price enters ‘cup-and-handle’ breakout mode
articles.description: The Shiba Inu breakout appears almost ten days after SHIB’s addition to Binance Card.

articles.title: Top 5 cryptocurrencies to watch this week: BTC, ADA, UNI, LINK, CHZ
articles.description: Bitcoin price is targeting $25,000 and holding this level could trigger breakouts in ADA, UNI, LINK and CHZ.

articles.title: Polygon, Fantom Poised for Significant Price Action
articles.description: Polygon's MATIC and Fantom's FTM have shown a negative correlation coefficient over the weekend. The former appears to be bound for higher highs, while the latter could be about to enter a steep correction. Volatility has struck the cryptocurrency market, and altcoins like MATIC and FTM look poised for significant price movement.MATIC has enjoyed impressive bullish momentum, surging nearly 13%...

articles.title: Over 1.2 Billion aUSD Minted in an Exploit of Polkadot’s DeFi Hub Acala
articles.description: Acala has become the latest DeFi protocol to come under attack as hackers mint 1.2 billion aUSD from thin air.

articles.title: Polygon Team Reports Apps On The Network Surge By 400%
articles.description: While the crypto market remains in its winter, some other sectors in the industry are experiencing a steady rise, one of the prominent examples of these sectors is the operational teams in the Polygon network. As of March this year, its total monthly active teams were around 8,000. However, recent data shows that the current monthly active teams for the network as of last month are about...

articles.title: Polkadot-based stablecoin aUSD depegs after Acala Network breach
articles.description: Acala Network, the decentralized finance hub of Polkadot, was breached and its stablecoin depegged from the dollar.

articles.title: “DeFi Hub of Polkadot” Suffers Major Hack
articles.description: The decentralized hub of the Polkadot network has suffered a security breach, which resulted in the de-pegging of the AUSD stablecoin
